detector_selection.selection_rule: zero hard-negative false positives first, then highest positive-label recall

evidence_links.description: prove the candidate is a discrete active panel rather than worker torso/arms/clothing/background motion
evidence_links.next_evidence: crop/shape/person-mask or pose-aware separation on the linked receipt crops/cards

evidence_links.description: prove the same source-origin panel entered/settled in output or disappeared into the output stack
evidence_links.next_evidence: denser before/during/after frames or longer diagnostic window around the receipt

evidence_links.description: prove the track has a credible source-to-output path rather than partial motion evidence
evidence_links.next_evidence: tracker continuity, occlusion TTL/relink evidence, and before/after frames

evidence_gap_matrix.purpose: explain which physical evidence link blocks trusted source-token counts; not a count source

note: Counts remain zero unless a perception-gate-approved source token exists. Suppressed/uncertain tracks are evidence, not failures to be force-counted.

proof_readiness.next_action: Audit accepted count receipts on more representative windows before broadening deployment.

source_token_work_queue.purpose: actionable receipt queue for worker-entangled tracks; not a count source

top_items.audit_question: Is the partially outside-person evidence a real panel edge/sheet, or just worker limbs/clothing/background?
evidence_requirements_to_allow_source_to: raw crops show a discrete wire-mesh/panel edge separate from worker clothing or arms
outside-person pixels are large enough and stable enough to be a physical panel, not detector jitter
source and output evidence both survive after person/part separation
top_items.recommended_action: inspect raw crops and add finer person/part separation before allowing source tokens

top_items.audit_question: Is the partially outside-person evidence a real panel edge/sheet, or just worker limbs/clothing/background?
evidence_requirements_to_allow_source_to: raw crops show a discrete wire-mesh/panel edge separate from worker clothing or arms
outside-person pixels are large enough and stable enough to be a physical panel, not detector jitter
source and output evidence both survive after person/part separation
top_items.recommended_action: inspect raw crops and add finer person/part separation before allowing source tokens

top_items.audit_question: Can any panel-shaped evidence be separated from the worker body, or should this remain suppressed?
evidence_requirements_to_allow_source_to: person-mask or pose-aware crop evidence exposes a panel-like region inside the coarse person box
panel evidence persists for several frames instead of appearing as a single noisy detector box
the track can be separated from torso/arm motion before a source token is allowed
top_items.recommended_action: needs person-mask/pose or better active-panel crop evidence; do not count from the current box alone
